name: ShakeObject3D

changelog.breaking: - The behavior for 3D box has been removed. The other behavior can be used for both models and boxes.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Shake 3D objects with translation and rotation.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ShakeModel3D

eventsFunctions.name: Shake
eventsFunctions.description: Shake the object with a linear easing at the start and the end.

eventsFunctions.name: StartShaking
eventsFunctions.description: Shake the object with a linear easing at the start and keep shaking until the stop action is used.

eventsFunctions.name: StopShaking
eventsFunctions.description: Stop shaking the object with a linear easing.

eventsFunctions.name: IsShaking
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is shaking.

eventsFunctions.name: IsStopping
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is stopping to shake.

eventsFunctions.name: Frequency
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the shaking frequency of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFrequency
eventsFunctions.description: Change the shaking frequency of the object.

description:
Shake 3D objects with translation and rotation.

The 3D racing game example uses this extension ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://3d-racing-game)).
